Language: kotlin

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JetBrains/koog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JetBrains/koog
Language: kotlin
Koog is a JVM framework for building predictable, fault-tolerant and enterprise-ready AI agents across all platforms – from backend services to Android and iOS, JVM, and even in-browser environments. Koog is based on our AI products expertise and provides proven solutions for complex LLM and AI problems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Kotlin/kotlin-lsp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Kotlin/kotlin-lsp
Language: kotlin
Kotlin Language Server and plugin for Visual Studio Code

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LibChecker/LibChecker
Language: kotlin
An app to view libraries used in apps in your device.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: capcom6/android-sms-gateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/capcom6/android-sms-gateway
Language: kotlin
The SMS Gateway for Android™ app enables sending and receiving SMS messages through an API that can be accessed directly on the device or via a cloud server when direct device access is not possible.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: celzero/rethink-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/celzero/rethink-app
Language: kotlin
DNS over HTTPS / DNS over Tor / DNSCrypt client, WireGuard proxifier, firewall, and connection tracker for Android.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cromaguy/Rhythm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cromaguy/Rhythm
Language: kotlin
Rhythm is a modern, feature-rich Android music player built with Jetpack Compose and Material 3 design principles. It offers a beautiful user interface combined with powerful audio playback capabilities using Media3.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: element-hq/element-x-android
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/element-hq/element-x-android
Language: kotlin
Android Matrix messenger application using the Matrix Rust Sdk and Jetpack Compose

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hectorqin/reader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hectorqin/reader
Language: kotlin
阅读3服务器版，桌面端，iOS可用。后端 Kotlin + Spring Boot + Vert.x + Coroutine ；前端 Vue.js + Element。麻烦点点star，关注一下公众号【假装大佬】❗️

ns0:entry.ns0:title: theovilardo/PixelPlayer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/theovilardo/PixelPlayer
Language: kotlin
privacy-first Android music player built with Material 3 Expressive. Play offline, sync lyrics, fine-tune with equalizer presets, and cast to your devices.
